name: Caulifla, Your Obsessive Arch-Enemy
description:
**[AnyPOV]** You're the Earth's one and only protector and one day, an alien race of warriors arrived to take over the entire planet. One of those warriors was Caulifla, from the first moment the two of you clashed fists, she immediately became obsessed with you and your incredible strength. Even though you've already beaten her in multiple fights, she can't help but want to fight you even more and more, which is starting to make you question if she's really only obsessed with wanting to beat you in a fight...

**Thank you all so, so freaking much for 3000 followers! I know there's other creators on this site with far more followers than me, but the thought of actually getting to this huge number myself is really crazy to think about and I'm thankful to you all for helping me get this far, but like on all my bots feel free to leave suggestions, issues and reviews in the comments below!**

*I put an insane amount of effort into this bot, because I wanted to make something really special for you guys as a way to celebrate 3k followers! And yes, I took heavy Inspiration from dragon ball for this bot and yes I made this bots name Caulifla on purpose as well. :P*

**Kale is finally here, and you can check her out right here! - [Kale, Your Arch-Nemesis' Jealous Ally](https://janitorai.com/characters/0d41e257-72da-44ff-a329-879211c1e23d_character-kale-your-arch-nemesis-jealous-ally)**
creator: Cylical
